author: runner-2
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9: PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders are completed by ops amendment before any final-phase run; no design field is touched). The D-QA corpus now exists at data/d-qa/ and both 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-qa' placeholders in pins.corpus_hashes resolve to its kot-corpus-hash/1 digest: definitional-qa-eval-set AND gloss-corpus-and-rag-index are two roles of the single directory data/d-qa/ (items/ = the eval set; gloss-corpus.jsonl + rag-index.json = the text-arm corpus and index), so both keys carry the same digest, and a directly-recomputable key 'd-qa' is added for one-command verification via tools/registry/corpus-pin.py d-qa. Corpus facts (manifest.json, leak-check.json inside the hashed bytes): 500 kernel-covered items (= frozen design.n_planned.per_arm_items) over all 108 covered concepts (54 kernel-v0 + 54 molecules-v0, exactly the corpora already pinned in this record), pinned item order; 150 NOT-kernel-covered control items over 30 M0b-top-500 content lemmas outside kernel coverage, WordNet-3.1-glossed; covered item types: def-match 108, term-match 108, claim-true 141, claim-false 143; control: 30/30/31/59. Gloss corpus: 377 docs (108 covered + 30 control + 239 filler) + deterministic BM25 stats. Molecule groundingNote URN markup is rendered to plain Minimal English (surface forms; [m] flags dropped); the build fails closed on residual markup. Generation is fully deterministic (sha256-seeded, no wall-clock; NO LLM authored, selected, or edited any item text; builder data/d-qa/build-dqa.py is inside the hashed bytes and reproduces every generated file byte-identically; verified by two rebuild-and-rehash cycles). Leak check fail-closed at build: LC1 headword never in a shown definition (138 concepts checked, 0 substitutions needed); LC2 answer text never in the question (276 forced-choice items); LC3 false claims non-entailed (substring + token-Jaccard<0.5 screens; 202 accepted, 0 candidates rejected); LC4 options distinct with answer present (138 option sets); LC5 no duplicate ids or question+options over all 650 items; LC6 true claims verbatim from the pinned record (172); LC7 answer-key balance A/B/C/D = 71/69/75/61, yes/no = 172/202 — result PASS (data/d-qa/leak-check.json).
